title: Cobblemon Journey
description: Embark on your Cobblemon Journey, adventure awaits you at every corner! Frequent updates with custom content you won't find elsewhere.
body:
**Embark on your Cobblemon Journey, adventure awaits you at every corner! Frequent updates with custom content you won't find elsewhere.**

### Modpack Features
- Optimizations [Sodium, Starlight, Ferritecore]
- Visual Enhancements [Iris, Falling Leaves, Visuality, Lamb's Dynamic Lighting, Model Fix, Lithium]
- Utilities [Journey Map, Mouse Tweaks, REI]
- Enhancement Resource Packs [Cobblemon Journey Map Icons]
- Voice Chat

### Multiplayer Features
- Pokemon breeding through the Daycare
- New Pokemon species and custom forms
- Custom world gen
- Player made Pokemon gyms
- Active and friendly community with frequent server events


Note: Cobblemon Journey is an unofficial Cobblemon modpack. An official server is included for the community but anyone is able to use this pack to make their own server or to play singleplayer. Big shoutout to the Cobblemon team and to the other modders with mods included in this pack, much love <3
